plan.text:
## Plan
Status: draft
Review: low

### Step 1: Extract Facts
Goal: Identify and list the three facts provided in the prompt.
Complexity: 1
Importance: 5
Dependencies: none
Independent: yes
Confidence: high
Verifiable: yes

### Step 2: Draft Note Part 1
Goal: Write the first part of the operator-style note, incorporating the fact that Open-Eywa treats the node as the durable unit of work.
Complexity: 3
Importance: 7
Dependencies: step 1
Independent: no
Confidence: high
Verifiable: yes

### Step 3: Draft Note Part 2
Goal: Write the second part of the operator-style note, incorporating the fact that mission runs are stored in mission folders.
Complexity: 3
Importance: 7
Dependencies: step 1
Independent: no
Confidence: high
Verifiable: yes

### Step 4: Draft Note Part 3
Goal: Write the third part of the operator-style note, incorporating the fact that testing improves reliability.
Complexity: 3
Importance: 7
Dependencies: step 1
Independent: no
Confidence: high
Verifiable: yes

### Step 5: Synthesize Final Note
Goal: Combine the three drafted parts into a single, cohesive operator-style note.
Complexity: 4
Importance: 9
Dependencies: step 2, step 3, step 4
Independent: no
Confidence: high
Verifiable: yes

state.text:
The task is to create a short operator-style note based on three provided facts. I have decomposed the task into five steps: extracting the facts, drafting each part of the note based on a fact, and finally synthesizing the complete note. This approach ensures that each part of the note is addressed and then combined into a coherent final output. No external research is required, and all information is available in the prompt.

Step 1, "Extract Facts," has completed. The extracted facts are:
1. Open-Eywa treats the node as the durable unit of work.
2. Mission runs are stored in mission folders.
3. Testing improves reliability.

children.final_output_text:
1. Open-Eywa treats the node as the durable unit of work.
2. Mission runs are stored in mission folders.
3. Testing improves reliability.
Part 1: Open-Eywa ensures durability by treating each node as a self-contained unit of work.

task_source.text: Using only the facts in this prompt, create a short operator-style note in three parts. Facts: (1) Open-Eywa treats the node as the durable unit of work. (2) Mission runs are stored in mission folders. (3) Testing improves reliability. Decompose this into a few small writing steps that require no external research, complete them, then synthesize a final note.
